results.rendered_html:
nākṣatra a. (trī f.) [nakṣatrāṇāmidaṃ aṇ] Starry, sidereal.
— traṃ A month computed by the moon's passage through the 27 lunar mansions, a month of 30 days of sixty Ghaṭīs each; nāḍīṣaṣṭhyā tu nākṣatramahorātraṃ prakīrtitaṃ  Sūrya S.
